'''Benits Stinex''', also known as '''"the Old Man"''', was a well known [[Architect/Legends|architect]] who designed a series of apartments in the [[Manarai Hills]] district of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He later became the chief architect and head of interior design and construction board the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. He was featured regularly in ''[[Beings Holozine]]''. Despite his proficiency, while in the design process, [[Teela Kaarz]] altered some of his layouts for better accessibility and efficiency.

{{Char-stub}}
